description: With a low ankle Fit and crafted from a soft cotton/nylon/spandex blend, these socks from fila make a great buy. They are specially engineered for maximum performance and comfort. Made of soft cotton, nylon and spandex with soft seams for a secure fit and exemplary comfort Cushioned heel and terry base for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfort Comfort grip at ankle leaves no mark Brand name knitted on the cuff Care Machine wash in warm water at 30 degrees Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low on a delicate cycle Do not iron
